steps.code:
<?php
require '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
$dir = WP_PLUGIN_DIR . '/classic-editor-fixture';
if (!is_dir($dir)) mkdir($dir, 0755, true);
file_put_contents($dir . '/classic-editor-fixture.php', implode("\n", ['<?php','/*','Plugin Name: Classic Editor (Test Fixture)','Description: Disables the block editor for Classic Editor E2E testing.','Version: 1.0','*/','add_filter("use_block_editor_for_post", "__return_false", 100);','']));
?>

<?php
require '/wordpress/wp-load.php';
update_option('wpt_frontend_url', 'http://localhost:5173');
update_option('wpt_allowed_origins', 'http://localhost:4321');
update_option('wpt_min_capability', 'contributor');
update_option('wpt_rate_limit_requests', 60);
update_option('wpt_rate_limit_window', 60);

?>
